channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei killed -- Iranian state media
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who led the Islamic Republic since 1989, is dead at 86
- Ayatollah Ali Khamenei: The cleric who reshaped Islamic Iran
- Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Hard-Line Cleric Who Made Iran a Regional Power, Is Dead at 86

- Iranian state media confirms death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
